specific_question: What was Rachel's team's average response time for patient inquiries about billing and next steps in Q4 2024? Are there any plans to require customer service employees to lower that response time by 2025?
answer: In Q4 2024, MediConn Solutions' customer support team answered email inquiries within 18 hours, while live chat and phone support during business hours (9 AM - 6 PM PT) had 8-minute average wait times. After-hours inquiries went to an automated system with a next-business-day response. Beginning in Q1 2025, the customer service team will be required to cut these response times by 20%.
dr_question: According to an article published on TechTarget.com in 2024, excellent patient communication is critical for a successful customer service department. How can MediConn Solutions improve patient communication in order to reduce service calls into Q12025?
